description: Structural evolutionary validation contract for ACTIVE_CONTEXT_STATE.json. Const retained only for permanent invariants. Phase names, status strings, and mutable flags use type/enum/required constraints. Markdown files are derived mirrors only.
schema_3_13_change_summary: Expanded phase_id/current_phase_id/previous_phase_id pattern to two-or-three-segment. Added schema_version 3.13. Reconciled completed_phases to accept both array and object formats. Triggered by state reconciliation packet base SHA e747ee5.
schema_3_14_change_summary: PURG04 post-merge validation packet: permit the live state to advance from PURG04_TRACK_A_MAIN_MERGE_EXECUTION to PURG04_TRACK_A_POST_MERGE_VALIDATION_PACKET, enforce the operator authorization plus no-real-execution packet artifacts, and allow next_phase/active_next_phase/deferred_phase to become null when the Transition Table defines no successor.
schema_3_15_change_summary: Residual risk carry-forward route opening: admit PURG_RESIDUAL_RISK_CARRY_FORWARD_PACKET as the live artifact-only route through an explicit operator route-opening packet, add validator enforcement for the residual candidate chain and new artifacts, materialize the PURG04 post-merge validation successor row in the active Transition Table, and preserve next_phase/active_next_phase null because the new residual route has no successor row.
schema_3_16_change_summary: INF revalidation route activation: promote INF_REVALIDATION_ROUTE_ADMISSION_PACKET from the TRACK_REVALIDATION_FIRST candidate into the live active-context route, admit infernus_revalidation_route_admission as a valid live/next route class, require the route-activation plus route-admission artifact family, and preserve next_phase/active_next_phase null because no successor row is active yet for the newly opened INF route.
schema_3_17_change_summary: INF revalidation readiness activation: promote INF_REVALIDATION_READINESS_PACKET from the live route-admission candidate into the active-context route, admit infernus_revalidation_readiness as a valid live/next route class, require the route-activation plus readiness artifact family, and preserve next_phase/active_next_phase null because no successor row is active yet for the newly opened readiness route.
schema_3_19_change_summary: INF revalidation execution: admit INF_REVALIDATION_EXECUTION_PACKET as the live controlled execution gate, add infernus_revalidation_execution as a valid live/next route class for roadmap/validator coherence, require the execution artifact family plus deterministic oracle evidence, materialize the operator-authorization successor row, and preserve next_phase/active_next_phase null because adjudication remains candidate-only after execution.
schema_3_20_change_summary: INF revalidation adjudication and closure: promote INF_REVALIDATION_ADJUDICATION_OR_CLOSURE_PACKET into the live documentary closure route, add infernus_revalidation_adjudication_or_closure as a valid live/next route class for roadmap/validator coherence, require the adjudication artifact family plus closure decision evidence, and preserve next_phase/active_next_phase null because no successor row is active after canonical closure.
schema_3_21_change_summary: BENCHUIX schema tracking repair: admit a non-executable benchuix_track top-level block so the BenchUIX roadmap candidate can be tracked in ACTIVE_CONTEXT_STATE.json without altering the live route, while enforcing trilha_lock_active=true and every BenchUIX execution/product/runtime/secret authorization flag as false.
schema_3_22_change_summary: BENCHUIX tracking generalization: replace single-phase consts in benchuix_track with bounded enums for BENCHUIX-00 through BENCHUIX-27 and CRISOL, preserving non-executable tracking, trilha_lock_active=true, and all BenchUIX execution/product/runtime/secret authorization flags as false.
schema_3_23_change_summary: BENCHUIX standing authorization materialization: record the operator standing authorization for candidate-only BENCHUIX transitions from BENCHUIX-08 through CRISOL, require a standing authorization artifact family plus validator enforcement, and preserve every real execution/product/runtime/secret/billing/OAuth/customer-data lock as false.

governance_gate_streak.description: Count of consecutive governance gates without a capacity gate in between. Resets to 0 on any capacity gate pass. Blocks at 3.

seen_gate_signatures.description: List of gate signatures (sha256[:16] of phase_class+locks) already executed. Repeated signature is blocked.

phase_class.description: Semantic class of the current gate. Determines circuit breaker routing (governance vs capacity).

title: ARIS Active Context Canonical Live State Schema v3.22
schema_3_18_change_summary: INF revalidation operator authorization: admit INF_REVALIDATION_OPERATOR_AUTHORIZATION_PACKET as the live post-readiness operator gate, add infernus_revalidation_operator_authorization as a valid live/next route class, require the operator-authorization artifact family, materialize the readiness successor row, and preserve next_phase/active_next_phase null because the new operator gate has no active successor row yet.
schema_3_19_change_summary: INF revalidation execution: admit INF_REVALIDATION_EXECUTION_PACKET as the live controlled execution gate, add infernus_revalidation_execution as a valid live/next route class for roadmap/validator coherence, require the execution artifact family plus deterministic oracle evidence, materialize the operator-authorization successor row, and preserve next_phase/active_next_phase null because adjudication remains candidate-only after execution.
schema_3_20_change_summary: INF revalidation adjudication and closure: promote INF_REVALIDATION_ADJUDICATION_OR_CLOSURE_PACKET into the live documentary closure route, add infernus_revalidation_adjudication_or_closure as a valid live/next route class for roadmap/validator coherence, require the adjudication artifact family plus closure decision evidence, and preserve next_phase/active_next_phase null because no successor row is active after canonical closure.
schema_3_21_change_summary: BENCHUIX schema tracking repair: admit a non-executable benchuix_track top-level block so the BenchUIX roadmap candidate can be tracked in ACTIVE_CONTEXT_STATE.json without altering the live route, while enforcing trilha_lock_active=true and every BenchUIX execution/product/runtime/secret authorization flag as false.
schema_3_22_change_summary: BENCHUIX tracking generalization: replace single-phase consts in benchuix_track with bounded enums for BENCHUIX-00 through BENCHUIX-27 and CRISOL, preserving non-executable tracking, trilha_lock_active=true, and all BenchUIX execution/product/runtime/secret authorization flags as false.
